message:
fix(events): add timeout/error state and correct Errors stat filter (#9046)

- #9037: Render an explicit error banner with a Retry button on the
  Events list tab when the cached events hook reports a failure and no
  cached data is available. The page previously spun indefinitely with
  no feedback when the backend was unreachable.
- #9038: The Errors dashboard stat block was counting Warning events
  (duplicate of the Warnings block). It now counts events whose type is
  'Error' and drills down to the error view.

Also wires isDemoFallback from useCachedEvents through to DashboardPage
so the Demo badge / yellow outline appears when demo data is in use.

Fixes #9037
Fixes #9038

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
